official_pick_rules.note: Lab Rating is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

summary: 2 official moneyline picks cleared the stricter model-probability and Lab Rating gates. 1 value-watch setup had good price math but did not clear official-pick probability rules.

lab_score_breakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

games.read: Detroit Tigers is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 80.1% model win probability and 9.2/10 Lab Rating. LyDia projects 80.1% against a 58.5% no-vig market number, a 21.7% model edge at -149. Detroit Tigers owns the starting pitcher edge by 43 points. Bullpen read: Supports LyDia side. Lineup check: Detroit Tigers is near its season form (-0.006 OPS); Los Angeles Angels is a touch below its season form (-0.027 OPS).

pick_team.label: Fresh

pick_team.score_reason: Fresh (2.2/10): 5.3 relief innings over the last three days, without allowing a run. 4 reliever appearances in the window.
pick_team.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

games.read: Colorado Rockies is a value watch, not an official pick. LyDia projects 51.4% against a 39.8% no-vig market number, a 11.6% model edge at +147. Lab Rating 8.4/10: model edge 35, pitcher 18.75, bullpen 9.87, market 15, base 5. The setup is strong, but official picks require at least 72.0% model probability and 8.0/10 Lab Rating.
